trivia: The stretched A220 does mainline work in a small-jet body: transatlantic-capable range, a five-abreast cabin, and trip costs that let airlines open thin routes no larger jet could justify.
It has quietly become the version airlines actually order: the -300 outsells its smaller sibling many times over.
funFacts: First flight: February 27, 2015, as the CSeries CS300.
airBaltic built its entire fleet around this single type.
Shares a type rating with the A220-100.
